analysis.btc_price_note: BTC ~$77,600 as of Apr 25 14:30 UTC. Down -0.57% on day, up ~13% in April (best monthly gain in 1 year). Key resistance $78.5K-$80.7K. Support ~$77,005 / $75,831.
sentiment_key_signals: Fear & Greed Index: 31 — Extreme Fear zone (down from 46 on Apr 23); bearish retail sentiment
BTC dominance 58.1% and rising — capital rotating into BTC as defensive crypto asset
Strategy bought 34,164 BTC for $2.54B — largest purchase since 2024 (bullish structural)
USDT supply up $5B to ~$150B — liquidity backdrop supportive for crypto markets
KelpDAO $292M exploit — DeFi TVL -$14B; altcoins correcting 2-3%; risk-off in DeFi
Technical: RSI 62.22 neutral; BTC below $78,677 recent swing high; trend unconfirmed
Short squeeze noted — supports price but open interest dropping, consolidation phase
FOMC Apr 28-29 — pre-event compression suppressing directional conviction
Institutional absorption: ~270,000 BTC (~$23B) by large-wallet addresses past month
CPI May 12, PPI May 13 — no major macro releases in next 24h
analysis.macro_backdrop: No major US macro data scheduled Apr 25. FOMC Apr 28-29 is next key risk event — rate hold at 3.50-3.75% widely expected but hawkish tone risk if sticky CPI (3.3% YoY). GDP Q1 advance + PCE due Apr 30. Iran ceasefire extended — risk assets benefiting from geopolitical calm. CPI/PPI not until May 12-13.
analysis.regime_rationale: Neutral (0.45): April monthly performance is structurally bullish (+13%) driven by institutional buying (Strategy $2.54B, ETF $411.5M single-day inflow, Metaplanet $50M zero-interest bonds). However, Fear & Greed collapsed to 31 (Extreme Fear) intraday, price is flat/slightly negative, RSI neutral at 62, and FOMC in 3-4 days is suppressing directional conviction. BTC is stuck below $78.5K-$80.7K resistance that has rejected it twice. Confidence 0.45 — below 0.50 threshold so macro filter is INACTIVE (bot trades on own signals). Mixed signals with no clear catalyst in next 24h.
